# Arcadia Home Care

> Arcadia Home Care provides specialized home care in Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area, combining clinical expertise with compassionate support for families since 2005.

## Organization
- Name: Arcadia Home Care
- Website: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/
- Phone: (844) 977-0050
- Email: info@arcadiahomecare.ca
- Address: 302 Bay Street, Toronto, Ontario M5H 0B6, Canada
- Service Area: Toronto and GTA (York, Peel, Durham, Halton)

## Core Services
- Dementia & Alzheimer's Home Care: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/dementia-alzheimers-home-care/
- Acquired Brain Injury Home Care: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/acquired-brain-injury-home-care/
- Rehabilitation Support: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/rehabilitation-support/
- Hospital Discharge Support: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/hospital-discharge-support/
- Palliative Home Care: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/palliative-home-care/
- Personal Support & Daily Living: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/personal-support-daily-living/
- Companion Care: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/companion-care/
- Respite Care: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/respite-care/
- Overnight & 24-Hour Care: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/overnight-24-hour-care/
- Case Management: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/case-management/
- Light Housekeeping: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/light-housekeeping/
- Downsizing & Transition Support: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/our-services/downsizing-transition-support/

## Condition Support
- Dementia Care at Home: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/conditions/dementia-care-at-home/
- Acquired Brain Injury Support: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/conditions/acquired-brain-injury-support/
- Stroke Recovery: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/conditions/stroke-recovery/
- Parkinson's Support: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/conditions/parkinsons-support/
- Palliative & Serious Illness: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/conditions/palliative-serious-illness/
- Frailty & Fall Prevention: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/conditions/frailty-fall-prevention/
- Post-Hospital Recovery: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/conditions/post-hospital-recovery/
- Caregiver Burnout Support: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/conditions/caregiver-burnout-support/

## Resource Guides (GTA Home Care)

### Dementia & Memory Care
- Early Signs of Dementia in a Parent: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/dementia-memory-care/early-signs-of-dementia-in-a-parent/
- How to Introduce Home Care to a Parent with Dementia: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/dementia-memory-care/introducing-home-care-dementia/
- How to Keep Someone with Dementia Safe at Home: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/dementia-memory-care/dementia-home-safety/
- Normal Aging vs. Dementia: What's the Difference?: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/dementia-memory-care/normal-aging-vs-dementia/
- When Should Someone with Dementia Stop Driving?: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/dementia-memory-care/dementia-when-to-stop-driving/

### Family Caregiver Support
- The Conversation You Keep Putting Off: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/family-caregiver-support/talking-to-parent-about-care/
- The Exhaustion You Have Stopped Noticing: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/family-caregiver-support/caregiver-burnout-warning-signs/
- The Guilt of Getting Help: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/family-caregiver-support/guilt-of-getting-help/
- The Weight You Are Carrying: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/family-caregiver-support/weight-of-caregiving/
- When Siblings Disagree About a Parent's Care: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/family-caregiver-support/siblings-disagree-parent-care/

### Navigating Home Care
- How Much Does Home Care Cost in Ontario?: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/navigating-home-care/home-care-cost-ontario/
- How to Know When It Is Time: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/navigating-home-care/signs-parent-needs-home-care/
- Spring Home Safety Checklist for Seniors: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/spring-home-safety-checklist-for-seniors/
- What Does a PSW Actually Do?: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/navigating-home-care/what-does-a-psw-do/
- What Good Care Actually Looks Like: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/navigating-home-care/recognizing-quality-home-care/
- What No One Tells You About the First Week of Home Care: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/navigating-home-care/what-no-one-tells-you-first-week-home-care/
- When the Person You Love Needs More Help Than You Can Give: https://www.arcadiahomecare.ca/resources/navigating-home-care/when-parent-needs-more-help/
